MemoryRecord.description: Represents a single memory record stored in or retrieved from a memory store.

content.description: The content of the memory record.
content.title: Content

id.description: A unique identifier for the memory record.
id.title: Id

metadata.description: Provider-specific metadata associated with the memory record.
metadata.title: Metadata

score.description: The relevance score of the memory record when populated on search results.
score.title: Score

MemoryRecord.title: MemoryRecord

description: Represents the list of memory records stored in or retrieved from a memory store.
title: MemoryRecords
